description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, finished in a matte black color. The back features a prominent triple-lens camera array housed in the top left corner, accompanied by a small flash, and a centered, glossy Apple logo. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels, showing a blurred, abstract wallpaper in shades of orange, blue, and black. The sides are thin and appear to be made of metal, with visible buttons on the left edge for volume and possibly a mute switch. The device is compact, lightweight, and designed for handheld use, typical of high-end mobile phones. No external case or cover is present, and the overall design emphasizes minimalism and premium materials.
description: A sleek, matte black smartphone with a triple-lens camera on the back and a large, edge-to-edge display on the front. Features a centered Apple logo and minimal side buttons.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the matte black finish, triple-lens camera array in the top left, and a centered Apple logo.
description_view_1: Left side profile revealing the slimness of the device and the presence of small, flush buttons.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large, edge-to-edge screen with a colorful abstract wallpaper and minimal bezels.
description_view_3: Right side profile, slim with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blurred, abstract wallpaper with orange, blue, and black tones; no icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses and a flash are arranged in a triangular layout within a square bump at the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: Three small, flush buttons are visible on the left edge, likely for volume control and mute; no buttons are visible on the right edge or front.
